title: Anthropic’s Cybersecurity Model May Thaw Tensions with Trump Administration
summary: Anthropic's new cybersecurity-focused model, Claude Mythos Preview, could improve its strained relationship with the Trump administration. The administration had previously criticized the company as a national security threat.
body:
Anthropic's new cybersecurity model, Claude Mythos Preview, is reportedly easing tensions with the Trump administration. The administration had previously labeled the company as a "RADICAL LEFT, WOKE COMPANY" and a menace to national security. This shift comes after nearly two months of public feuding between the two entities.

The new model's focus on cybersecurity could be the key to mending fences. The Trump administration has prioritized cybersecurity as a critical national security issue, and Anthropic's latest offering aligns with these priorities. This development could also set a precedent for other AI companies seeking to work with the government.

The future of this relationship remains uncertain. While the new model may have softened the administration's stance, it's unclear if this will lead to long-term cooperation. The administration's previous criticisms were severe, and rebuilding trust will take time. However, this could be a significant step towards Anthropic regaining favor with the government.
twitterThread:

Anthropic's Claude Mythos Preview is a cybersecurity-focused AI model. 

The Trump admin has made cybersecurity a top priority. The timing isn't a coincidence.

Here's why this matters: 

Anthropic was labeled a "menace to national security" just months ago. Now, they're working towards cooperation. 

This is a HUGE shift.

The wild part: 

This could set a precedent for other AI companies. If Anthropic can mend fences, others might follow. 

Let that sink in.

Hot take: 

This isn't just about cybersecurity. It's about AI's role in national security. The Trump admin is sending a clear message: align with us, or else.
